scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — the full plan delivered: (1) empirical-fortification pass via engine/tools/fetch_structural_reference.py against plato.stanford.edu (33 fetches queued, 31 succeeded, 0 AnonymizationViolation events, ~2.0s rate-limit empirically observed, 2 fetch errors 404 on URL-slug guesses for nodes without stand-alone SEP entries); (2) closes T1-A through T1-D in engine/build_readiness/fetch_structural_reference_first_exercise.md per ADR 0053 — Tier 1 table rows updated with 'Resolved at S-0122' plus empirical numbers; (3) findings report at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_findings.md (218 lines) — disposition matrix over ~58 distinct defects across ~445 audited elements; aggregate defect rate ~13% concentrated in cross-bridge reversals (8 edges, 5 contradicted by own teaching_notes prose) and historical-genealogy (14 cross-bridges + 2 within-service + 1 within-mind); (4) audit-system-input report at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_audit_system_input.md (131 lines) — 6 validator soft-warn recommendations (4 gate-feasible immediately, 1 pending schema extension, 1 deferred to Phase 6+); (5) product ADR 0061 retyping 17 history-terminator → modern-philosophy edges from pedagogical_prerequisite to historical_influence (140 lines; product/adr/0061-historical-influence-retyping-for-history-terminator-bridges.md); (6) 5 GitHub Issues filed per disposition matrix — #59 (direction reversals 15 edges, bug), #60 (historical retypings 17 edges, bug), #61 (weak-edge cleanup 4 prunes + 5 retain-with-annotation, tech-debt), #62 (4 validator soft-warn proposals, enhancement), #63 (evidence-field annotations on 7 defensible edges, documentation); (7) STATE.md Current-phase + Last-build-session + Next-session-work-item updated for S-0122 closeout + S-0123 followups; (8) ENGINE_LOG [Unreleased] gained S-0122 Added + Changed entries; (9) product/adr/README.md index updated with ADR 0061 row; (10) both optional ADRs from master-plan §'Forward pointers' (philosophy-of-religion readmission, engine-side post-phase-audit pattern) SKIPPED — no crystallization in the audit data justified authoring (per no-preemptive-deferral discipline judgment call); (11) MemPalace diary write succeeded at diary_wing_claude_20260510_221958859628_c01af81d7c5a. No descope; no reorder; no deferral mid-session. Plan-mode + Auto-mode handoff at start was clean (plan authored, ExitPlanMode approved, execution proceeded without permissions friction).

outcome_summary: Phase 5 production-audit closeout delivered three primary artifacts: findings report (disposition matrix over ~58 distinct defects across ~445 audited elements; ~13% aggregate defect rate), audit-system-input report (4 gate-feasible validator soft-warn proposals), and product ADR 0061 retyping 17 history-terminator cross-bridges from pedagogical_prerequisite to historical_influence. Empirical-fortification first-exercise of fetch_structural_reference.py closes T1-A through T1-D per ADR 0053: 33 SEP fetches queued / 31 succeeded / 0 AnonymizationViolation / ~2.0s rate-limit empirically observed / 30 corroborated + 15 forward-link-present + 1 structural-only verdict updates. 5 GitHub Issues filed per disposition matrix (#59 direction reversals, #60 historical retypings, #61 weak-edge cleanup, #62 validator soft-warns, #63 evidence-field annotations). Both optional ADRs (philosophy-of-religion readmission, engine-side post-phase-audit pattern) skipped — no crystallization in the audit data justified authoring. Soft-warns at shutdown: adr_consequences_deliverable_audit on ADR 0049 S-0100 (pre-existing carryover), mempalace_zero_citations_after_search (boot search informed planning but no drawer IDs cited; one-off — monitor for persistence). 366 missing_rigor_score warns are Phase 6 rigor-calibration scope per Phase 5 master plan §Anti-scope; not addressed.
next_session_handle: S-0123 — Execute Phase 5 production-audit follow-ups per S-0122 findings report's disposition matrix. Four migrations to author (batchable into one session if budget allows): (1) 0061_retype_historical_influence_crossbridges_part1.sql per ADR 0061 (Issue #60) — 17 history-terminator edges retyped from pedagogical_prerequisite to historical_influence with Layer 2.5 postcondition assertions per ADR 0055; (2) direction-flip migration (Issue #59) — 15 reversed edges flipped (8 cross-bridge B + 7 within-subdomain); (3) weak-edge cleanup migration (Issue #61) — 4 prunes + 5 retain-with-annotation; (4) evidence-field annotation migration (Issue #63) — 7 defensible edges with annotation prose. The retyping migration is gating since it activates `historical_influence` in PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md. S-0124+ candidates: add 4 validator soft-warns from audit-system-input report (Issue #62; 3 gate-feasible immediately, 1 pending node-class schema extension); adjudicate S-0121 audit findings (User adjudication subsection); OQ-DEC1-A through OQ-DEC1-D settlement to unblock Phase 6 self-correction master plan.
